response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned staff-level generalist with nearly two decades of production engineering, strong TypeScript/Node.js depth, and recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure, which maps directly to this role's key technologies. However, the role requires 8+ years building AI-driven solutions, and his AI exposure appears to span only about one year at re:cinq; there is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, or Python, and cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK for application work rather than designing AI systems on cloud platforms. His consulting and teaching background suggests customer-facing potential, but the core GenAI depth gap makes him a stretch for a staff forward-deployed GenAI position.
strengths: Current hands-on experience with MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling, directly relevant to the role's key technologies
19+ years of production software engineering with strong TypeScript/Node.js and full-stack breadth, including staff-level roles
Consulting, workshop, and mentoring track record (Altom, Selenium courses, conference talks) suited to forward-deployed, customer-facing work
concerns: Roughly 1 year of AI/GenAI experience versus the required 8+ years building production AI solutions
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
Python absent from skills and cloud experience appears limited to AWS CDK application work rather than designing AI systems on major cloud platforms

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG/vector DB and Python evidence
